_comment: Example PRD (Product Requirements Document) for Ralph agent
Copy this file to prd.json in the project root and customize for your project
- branchName: Git branch for this Ralph session (e.g., 'ralph/001-feature-name')
- userStories: Array of user story objects (see structure below)
- description: Detailed description of what needs to be done
- acceptanceCriteria: Array of strings defining done conditions
- passes: Boolean - Ralph sets to true when story is complete
- notes: Optional context or references to spec files

userStories.title: Example User Story
userStories.description: Clear description of what needs to be implemented. Include context about why this feature is needed and what problem it solves.
userStories.notes: Optional: Reference to SPEC files, technical constraints, dependencies

userStories.title: Another Example Story
userStories.description: Each user story should be independent and completable in one Ralph iteration.

userStories._example: Use priority to guide Ralph's selection order (lower number = higher priority)
